initialValue:
name: Rolling Deploy Orders API
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      image_digest:
        description: Tested image digest
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  rollout:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: ./scripts/update-ecs-service.sh orders-api-prod
      - run: ./scripts/register-task-definition.sh "${{ inputs.image_digest }}"
      - run: ./scripts/check-public-version.sh orders-api:42

expected.label: production environment has the service URL
first step registers the task definition
second step updates the ECS service
third step waits for target health
